name: operio-agent
description: Autonomous virtual dispatcher and SRE for brick-and-mortar operations, powered by Gemini and the Model Context Protocol.

scripts.dev: PYTHONPATH=agents uv run --project agents uvicorn operio_agent.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.start: PYTHONPATH=agents uv run --project agents uvicorn operio_agent.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.test: vitest run --dir tests && pnpm --filter operio-frontend test && PYTHONPATH=agents uv run --project agents pytest
scripts.evaluate: PYTHONPATH=agents uv run --project agents pytest agents/tests/evaluate_brain.py
